description_long: This induction cooker features a circular, flat cooking surface with a prominent concentric ring pattern and a large arrow motif at the center, likely indicating the optimal placement for cookware. The body is predominantly white with black and gray accents, and it includes four protruding black handles spaced evenly around the perimeter for easy handling or repositioning. On one side, there is a raised control module with a rotary knob, a small circular display or indicator, and a lever, suggesting manual control of power or temperature. The front edge displays a red brand logo, and there are several small ports or indicator lights along the side. The overall design is sleek and modern, with a low profile and robust construction, suitable for portable or countertop use in urban environments. The surface appears to be made of heat-resistant glass or ceramic, while the body is likely constructed from durable plastic and metal components.
description: A modern, circular induction cooker with a black-and-white color scheme, four handles, and a raised control module featuring a knob and lever.
description_view_0: Front view showing the brand logo, four handles, and the raised control module with a knob and lever on the right.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the control module's lever and knob, as well as the circular cooking surface and handles.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the ports or indicator lights on the side, the back of the control module, and the overall low profile.
description_view_3: Side view focusing on the control module's components and the arrangement of the handles around the cooktop.
attribute_control_panel_layout: The control panel is raised on one side of the cooker and features a rotary knob, a lever, and a small circular display or indicator. There are no visible touch areas or digital screens, but several small indicator lights or ports are present along the side. The brand logo is prominently displayed on the front edge.
